news.t: GraniteShares Expands Autocallable ETF Lineup with Launch of PLTR and HOOD ETFs

overview.description: The GraniteShares Autocallable PLTR ETF (PLA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund is actively managed, investing in a laddered portfolio of single-stock autocallable options referencing the price of Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR) PLA was launched on May 19, 2026 and is issued by GraniteShares.

data.title: GraniteShares Expands Autocallable ETF Lineup with Launch of PLTR and HOOD ETFs
data.text: GraniteShares Autocallable PLTR ETF (PLA) and GraniteShares Autocallable HOOD ETF (AHD) begin trading on May 19 New York, May 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- GraniteShares, an independent ETF issuer spec...
